steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Let's compute indicators given the 2024 year-end data from the prompt.
# We'll hard-code the figures from the data.
# We'll use the December 31, 2024 figures.
AT_TOTAL = 50112301000.0  # Ativo Total
CA = 3958758000.0        # Caixa e equivalentes de Caixa - ultimo
CA2 = CA
CA Circulante = 7198390000.0
# But Python variable names can't have spaces; we'll define properly.
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Compute indicators for ENGIE BRASIL ENERGIA (Dec 2024 data) using the provided figures.
AT_Total = 50112301000.0
Dispo = 3958758000.0  # Disponibilidades
Ativo_Circ = 7198390000.0
Pass_Circ = 7273026000.0
# Debts
Deb_Cur = 2610790000.0  # Empréstimos e Financiamentos - curto prazo
Deb_Lon = 21036859000.0  # Empréstimos e Financiamentos - não circulante
Dívida_Bruta = Deb_Cur + Deb_Lon
# Caixa
Caixa = 3958758000.0
Patri_Liq = 12280398000.0
Receita_12m = 11218635000.0
EBIT_12m = 7682051000.0
Lucro_Liq_12m = 4302841000.0
# Equity and Shares
Total_Shares = 815927740.0
# 12m numbers from 2024: LPA, LPA calc
LPA = Lucro_Liq_12m / Total_Shares
VPA = Patri_Liq / Total_Shares
P_price = 39.29
P_L = P_price / LPA
P_VP = P_price / VPA
P_EBIT = P_price / (EBIT_12m / Total_Shares)
# PSR uses revenue per share
PSR = P_price / (Receita_12m / Total_Shares)
P_Ativos = P_price / (AT_Total / Total_Shares)
Giro_Ativos = Receita_12m / AT_Total
CapGiro_perShare = (Ativo_Circ - Pass_Circ) / Total_Shares
P_CapGiro = P_price / CapGiro_perShare if CapGiro_perShare != 0 else float('inf')
P_AtivCircLiq_perShare = (Ativo_Circ - Pass_Circ) / Total_Shares
P_AtivCircLiq = P_price / P_AtivCircLiq_perShare if P_AtivCircLiq_perShare != 0 else float('inf')
# Margins
Marg_Bruta =  (6.106582e9) / Receita_12m
Marg_EBIT = EBIT_12m / Receita_12m
Marg_Liq = Lucro_Liq_12m / Receita_12m
EBIT_perc_atv = EBIT_12m / AT_Total
# ROIC, ROE
Fornecedores = 1099881000.0  # Fornecedores value from 2.01.02 2024-12-31
ROIC = EBIT_12m / (AT_Total - Fornecedores - Caixa)
ROE = Lucro_Liq_12m / Patri_Liq
# Liquidity ratio
LiquidityCorr = (Ativo_Circ - Pass_Circ) / Pass_Circ
# Debt to equity
DivBrPatrim = Dívida_Bruta / Patri_Liq
# EV and EBITDA
MarketCap = P_price * Total_Shares
NetDebt = Dívida_Bruta - Caixa
EV = MarketCap + NetDebt
EBITDA = EBIT_12m + 1072024000.0
EV_EBITDA = EV / EBITDA
EV_EBIT = EV / EBIT_12m
# LPA, VPA numeric values above; print results with two decimals for percentages later
print('LPA', LPA)
print('VPA', VPA)
print('P/L', P_L)
print('P/VP', P_VP)
print('P/EBIT', P_EBIT)
print('PSR', PSR)
print('P/Ativos', P_Ativos)
print('Giro Ativos', Giro_Ativos)
print('P/Cap.Giro', P_CapGiro)
print('P/Ativ Circ Liq', P_AtivCircLiq)
print('Marg Bruta', Marg_Bruta)
print('Marg EBIT', Marg_EBIT)
print('Marg Liquida', Marg_Liq)
print('EBIT / Ativo', EBIT_perc_atv)
print('ROIC', ROIC)
print('ROE', ROE)
print('Liquidez Corr', LiquidityCorr)
print('Div Br/ Patrim', DivBrPatrim)
print('EV / EBITDA', EV_EBITDA)
print('EV / EBIT', EV_EBIT)
print('MarketCap', MarketCap)
print('EV', EV)
print('Dívida Bruta', Dívida_Bruta)
print('Dívida Liquida', NetDebt)
print('Capex', EBITDA)
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
